center.name: 鲁文佐里山脉
center.summary: 鲁文佐里山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Olive woodpecker、Rwenzori batis、Rwenzori double-collared sunbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The olive woodpecker is native to central, east and southern Africa, from the Ruwenzori Mountains to the Western Cape

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Rwenzori batis occurs in the Albertine Rift from the Rwenzori Mountains in the north to Mount Kabobo in the south

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Ruwenzori range of mountains in south central Africa
